intentAndPurpose.intent: Groups multiple Chip components with shared selection state, keyboard navigation, and layout. Supports single-select (default) and multi-select modes. Propagates size, attention, and appearance to all child Chips.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Appearance propagated to all child Chips.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Accessible label for the group element.

props.name: aria-labelledby
props.description: ID of an element that labels this group.

props.name: attention
props.description: Emphasis level propagated to all child Chips.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable all chips in the group.

props.name: loopFocus
props.description: Loop keyboard focus from last item back to first. Default: true (Base UI default).

props.name: maxSelections
props.description: Maximum number of chips that can be selected at once (multi-select only).

props.name: multiple
props.description: Allow multiple chips to be selected simultaneously. Default: false.

props.name: required
props.description: Prevent deselecting the last selected chip. In controlled mode this blocks the callback; in uncontrolled mode it also prevents the internal state from reaching an empty array.

props.name: size
props.description: Size propagated to all child Chips.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected values (array of chip `value` strings).

props.name: wrap
props.description: Whether chips wrap to the next line. Default: true.
